content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Vanya and Cubes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/492/A
constraints: 1 <= number of cubes in each pile <= 100
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of cubes. The second line contains n space-separated integers, representing the number of cubes in each pile.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the number of cubes in the last pile after Vanya's operation.

solution.approach: Iterate over each pile of cubes, and for each pile, calculate the number of cubes that can be moved to the next pile.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
m = a[-1]
for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
    if a[i] > m:
        m = a[i]
print(m)
